panels.title: Action mix (rate over 5m)
panels.description: Rate of moderation decisions by action across both channels. A ladder climbing through log → censor → drop → mute → kick → ban corresponds to escalating heat; most traffic should sit on 'none' or 'log'.

panels.title: Channel breakdown (rate over 5m)
panels.description: IC vs OOC split. Most moderation events should land on OOC for typical chat servers; a spike in IC events usually means a courtroom is being flooded.

panels.title: Tracked IPIDs with heat
panels.description: Count of clients currently accumulating moderation heat. A spike here tends to precede enforcement actions.

panels.title: Active mutes
panels.description: IPIDs currently under an auto-mute. Should drop to zero within mute_duration_seconds of the last offense.

panels.title: Mean check latency (ns)
panels.description: Average time spent in ContentModerator::check() including all enabled layers and audit log fan-out. Watch for drift after enabling Layer 2 (remote) or Layer 3 (embeddings).

panels.title: Remote classifier error rate
panels.description: Count of non-2xx responses from the OpenAI moderation endpoint in the last 15 minutes, grouped by cause. With fail_open=true, errors are silently absorbed and this is the only way to notice.

panels.title: Per-layer mean latency (ns)
panels.description: How long each moderation layer takes per invocation. unicode and urls are sub-millisecond; remote is ~100ms when enabled; embeddings varies by model size.

panels.title: Layer call rate (5m)
panels.description: How often each layer runs. Layers short-circuit when config disables them, so this panel is also a deployment sanity check: if the remote layer has zero calls despite being enabled, check the API key.

panels.title: Recent moderation events (CloudWatch)
panels.description: JSON-structured moderation events shipped to CloudWatch. Set the CloudWatch log group in kagami.json under content_moderation.audit.cloudwatch_log_group. Filter syntax is CloudWatch Logs Insights — adjust the `fields` line to surface additional axes.

targets.expression:
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter @logStream like /moderation/
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 200

panels.title: Action ladder heatmap
panels.description: Distribution of moderation actions over time. A bar climbing up the action axis (more severe actions over time) indicates heat escalation.
